description_long: This object is a handheld gaming console with a rectangular body and detachable controllers on either side, colored blue on the left and red on the right. The front features a large display screen with the Nintendo Switch logo, flanked by various physical buttons and joysticks for user input. The back is matte black with branding and regulatory information, as well as a central kickstand for tabletop use. The top edge includes visible ventilation grilles and additional buttons, while the bottom edge is mostly smooth. The controllers are ergonomically shaped and can be removed or attached for different play styles. The overall design is sleek, compact, and portable, suitable for both handheld and tabletop gaming.
description: A compact, rectangular handheld gaming console with a large screen, blue and red detachable controllers, and a central kickstand on the back. The design is sleek and portable, with physical buttons and joysticks for user input.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the matte black back, Nintendo Switch branding, and the extended central kickstand, with blue and red controllers attached.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the device, the blue controller, and the edge of the kickstand.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the large screen with the Nintendo Switch logo, blue and red controllers, and all main control buttons and joysticks.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the red controller, the edge of the kickstand, and the device's slim profile.
